catalog_order: data/exercisesMerged.ts EXERCISES = EXERCISES_BUILTIN + EXERCISES_FUNCTIONAL_FITNESS + OTA_MOVEMENTS; positions are 1-indexed.

runs.notes: Replaced the draft/bulk-style copy for the next 200 merged-catalog exercises with 2-4 sentence instructional descriptions including setup, execution, form cues, and http(s) sources. Obscure combo skills use component-pattern sources where exact pages were not available.
runs.source_strategy: Preferred exact exercise-library pages when available; used component-pattern sources for rare functional-fitness combinations such as bottoms-up half-kneeling windmills, toe-balance overhead squats, and suspension-assisted contralateral pistol squats.

runs.notes: Replaced draft/bulk-style copy for merged-catalog positions 1001-1200 with 2-4 sentence instructional descriptions including setup, execution, form cues, and http(s) sources. Obscure functional-fitness combinations use exact component-pattern sources where exact pages were not available.
runs.source_strategy: Preferred ACE, ExRx, NASM, and Catalyst/major exercise-library sources for standard lifts; used component-pattern sources for rare ring planche/cross, suspension single-leg, macebell, clubbell, Indian-club, and bottoms-up kettlebell combinations.
